title: Innovative Product Feature
scenario: Describe a new feature for a smart home security system that allows users to remotely monitor and control their home's temperature, lighting, and security cameras. The feature should be easy to use and provide a seamless user experience.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the tone is conversational and user-friendly
Verify if the feature description meets the word count and tone constraints
Evaluate if the feature is easy to understand and provides a seamless user experience
